description_long: This is a modern double bed featuring a large, rectangular headboard split into two panels, each with a slight angle and clean lines. The bed is dressed in white bedding, including a fitted sheet, a loosely draped flat sheet, and two large pillows, one of which is propped upright while the other lies at an angle. The mattress is thick and supported by a low-profile, upholstered platform base in a muted gray tone. The bedding appears slightly rumpled, giving a lived-in, realistic appearance. The bed sits on short, dark legs that lift it just above the ground, and the overall design is minimalist and contemporary. The absence of a footboard and the simplicity of the frame emphasize a sleek, urban aesthetic.
description: A modern double bed with a split-panel headboard, white bedding, and a low-profile gray platform base. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with a slightly rumpled, realistic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split-panel headboard, two pillows, and neatly draped white bedding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the angled pillows, and the draped sheet over the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard and the visible outline of the pillows through the bedding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headboard, pillows, and the way the bedding falls over the side.
